behavior: 取得所有 Scrum Teams 列表並回傳 List<ScrumTeamDto>
domainModelNotes: 此為查詢操作，不會修改任何 domain 狀態
應回傳所有存在的 Scrum Teams

dependencies.name: scrumTeamDtoProjection
dependencies.note: 使用 projection 查詢資料庫並回傳 DTO 結果

testScenarios.name: should_return_all_teams_when_teams_exist
testScenarios.given: 多個 Scrum Teams 已建立

testScenarios.name: should_return_empty_list_when_no_teams_exist
testScenarios.given: 沒有任何 Scrum Team 存在
then: 應該成功回傳空的 List<ScrumTeamReadOnly>

projections.name: ScrumTeamDtoProjection extends Projection<ScrumTeamDtoProjectionInput, List<ScrumTeamDto>>
projections.description: 查詢資料庫並回傳 List<ScrumTeamDto>
